tasks.title: Create src/cli.ts with runCli flag logic
tasks.notes: Created src/cli.ts exporting runCli(argv). Uses runtime require('../package.json') to avoid TS6059 rootDir constraint. Handles --help/-h/positional-help and --version/-v. tsc --noEmit passes.

tasks.title: Wire src/index.ts to call runCli before server start
tasks.notes: Modified src/index.ts to import runCli from ./cli and call it with process.argv before app.listen(). If handled is true, process exits with exitCode. tsc --noEmit and lint both pass.

tasks.title: Add CLI tests in tests/cli.test.ts
tasks.notes: Created tests/cli.test.ts with 7 unit tests for runCli synthetic argv, 2 stdout content tests via console.log spy, and 4 spawnSync smoke tests. Used shell:true and platform-aware .cmd suffix for Windows compatibility. All 34 tests pass (npm test). Linter clean.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 1: npm test passes all CLI tests
tasks.notes: npm test: 34 tests passed across 3 suites (cli.test.ts, notes.test.ts, validation.test.ts). npm run lint: clean. tsc --noEmit: passes. All Phase 1 acceptance criteria met.

tasks.title: Extend validation.ts to reject blank content
tasks.notes: Updated validateCreateInput and validateUpdateInput to check obj.content.trim().length === 0 in addition to typeof check. Error message changed to 'Content must not be blank'. tsc --noEmit passes.

tasks.title: Trim blank query params in src/api/notes.ts
tasks.notes: Updated GET /api/notes handler to trim query parameters tag and q. Whitespace-only parameters are now treated as undefined. tsc --noEmit passes.

tasks.title: Add blank-input tests to validation and notes test files
tasks.notes: Extended validation.test.ts with 4 new tests for blank content validation (whitespace-only and empty strings in create/update). Extended notes.test.ts with 3 new tests for POST blank content and GET with blank query params. All 41 tests pass (7 new), lint and build clean.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 2: npm test passes all tests
tasks.notes: npm test: 41 tests passed (all test suites: cli.test.ts, notes.test.ts, validation.test.ts). npm run lint: clean. npm run build: clean. All Phase 2 acceptance criteria met.
